betOfDay.reasoning: Clippers dominant at home — locked at -13.5 across all major books. Bucks struggling on the road this season and missing key contributors. Classic fade-the-road-underdog spot. Take the Clippers big.

picks.reasoning: Clippers locked at -13.5 across all books. Dominant home team, Bucks struggling on road.
Rockets top-5 West, dominant road team. Bulls weak at home this season. Line consistent at -8.5.
Warriors slight road favorite — line movement toward GSW. Mavs inconsistent at home this stretch.
Raptors road favorite vs Jazz, worst team in the league. Double-digit spread justified against Utah's rebuild.
